version:1.5
cell:B3:t:Introduction:l:1:f:1:c:3:bg:1:cf:1
cell:B5:t:Blood Pressure Tracker app enables you to record your blood pressure on a daily basis along with your exercise and meals. :f:2
cell:B6:f:2
cell:B7:t:Blood Pressure Checklist serves as a guideline for taking the blood pressure readings at home.  The checkmark functionality has also been included so you can highlight the important points quickly.:f:2:bg:2
cell:B8:f:2
cell:B9:t:Blood Pressure Log sheet helps you record your blood pressure readings on a daily basis for an entire month. The log has been designed for taking the readings four times per day. Provision has been made for you to add your heart beats per minute along side the readings.The record is also visualised with the help of a graph.:f:2
cell:B10:f:2
cell:B11:t:Monthly Tracker sheet helps you keep a detailed record of your weight, exercise duration and meals. The “Notes” section lets you write important notes along side the records.:f:2:bg:2
cell:B12:f:2
cell:B13:t:Entering data is simple. Tap on the cell to edit and add the text. Locally save your Blood Pressure Tracker as a file, and re-use it with minimal changes. Simply tap e-mail to send it to your family and friends instantly and get feedback from them. Alternatively, you can email it to yourself.:f:2
cell:B14:f:2
cell:B15:t:If you need any further assistance in using the Blood Pressure Tracker, or would like to see some new features in the future versions of the application, please write to us at marketing@tickervalue.com You can also meet us on Skype by sending a contact request to aspiring.investments.:f:2:bg:2

cell:A12:b::1::
